steps.title: Substitute x = 4 into the function
steps.content: To find $f(4)$, we substitute $x = 4$ into the given function $f(x) = 7x + 2$.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: The correct answer is $30$. The value of $f\left(x\right)$ when $x=4$ can be found by substituting $4$ for $x$ in the given equation $f\left(x\right)=7x+2$. This yields $f\left(4\right)=7\left(4\right)+2$, or $f\left(4\right)=30$. Therefore, when $x=4$, the value of $f\left(x\right)$ is $30$.
